caption: A man with a goatee, wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT MAN", a black baseball cap with a gold emblem, and gold jewelry including a bracelet and necklace, is seated in a podcast studio. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a stand and wears over-ear headphones. The background consists of a white wall featuring repeated logos that include the words "HUSTLE" and stars, as well as a larger red logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101". In the bottom corners of the scene, digital overlays display "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Over the course of the sequence, the man is initially still, then raises his right hand to adjust his headphones, and finally uses both hands to hold and adjust the headphones on his ears while looking slightly to his left.
